# Anduril Australia and Asia Pacific welcomes Pete Quinn AO, CSC as Vice President of Strategy

Anduril Australia is thrilled to announce the hiring of Pete Quinn AO, CSC as Vice President Strategy, Anduril Australia and Asia Pacific.
